# Hot Rolling

**Summary**: A standard API test to simulate fluid circulation and evaluate the stability of drilling fluids.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alshalan|Alshalan, 2022]] applied hot rolling to assess the performance of various inhibitor concentrations.
